title: Understanding Thrust and Weight
text: To find the initial acceleration, consider the forces acting on the rocket. The thrust from the engines and the gravitational force (weight) are the two main forces.

title: Calculate the Weight of the Rocket
text: The weight of the rocket can be calculated using the formula: $$weight=mass gravity$$. Use $$\frac{9.8m}{s^2}$$ for gravity.

title: Calculate the Net Force
text: The net force acting on the rocket is the thrust minus the weight. Use the formula: net $$force=thrust-weight$$.

title: Find the Initial Acceleration
text: Use Newton's second law to find the acceleration: $$acceleration=net$$ $$\frac{force}{mass}$$.
